name: 安娜·阿尔皮萨尔
awards: 2025年 第82届威尼斯电影节 地平线单元奖 最佳短片 (提名) 努尔黑姆松
name_full: 安娜·阿尔皮萨尔 Ana Alpizar

last_movies.title: Hapi Berdey Yusimi In Yur Dey

introduction: Ana A. Alpizar is a Cuban director, screenwriter, producer, and editor. As a director, Ana's short film The Fisherman screened at Sundance, Miami, NALIP, Rooftop Films, and was awarded and screened in many other festivals worldwide. The Premiere won the top prize at the China Women's Film Festival, between other awards. Her latest short, Hapi Berdey Yusimi in Yur Dey, was an official selection at the New Orleans Film Festival, the Brooklyn Film Festival, and more.Since 2019, she has worked as an editor in film, TV, and advertising, editing two feature films, Domestic Animals (Dir, Juan Pablo Daranas Molina) and Ciao Babes & Baddies, Dir Bianca di Marco) as well as several short films, including Out the Window Through The Wall, which was an Official Selection at Cannes 2024.
